name: Chili Sauce
recipeInstructions: Use a large, heavy kettle to ensure even heat distribution and avoid hot spots. Tomatoes can easily "catch" and burn, which would ruin the entire batch. Combine all ingredients in the kettle. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer until the sauce reaches your desired thickness (this may take from 1 to 3 hours depending on the amount of tomato juice). Stir frequently while cooking. Once thick enough, carefully pour the hot chili sauce into prepared bottles and process in a boiling water bath canner for 15 minutes. Yield: about 8 pints.
